scenarios.title: User navigates to Dashboard and sees summary cards
scenarios.userAction: User opens the Dashboard page from the main navigation
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Summary cards display with correct KPI values, loading spinners resolve within 3 seconds
scenarios.testReference: AP-T001: Page Load - User navigates to Dashboard and sees summary cards

scenarios.title: User applies date range filter and data refreshes
scenarios.userAction: User selects a date range from the filter dropdown and clicks Apply
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Table and charts update to reflect the selected date range, URL query params update

scenarios.title: User clears all filters and data resets to defaults
scenarios.userAction: User clicks the Clear Filters button
scenarios.expectedOutcome: All filter selections reset, table shows unfiltered data, URL query params cleared
